title: Vainilla de Prisy
body:
# EN
### Prisy's Vanilla
I present to you my first, and probably only, modpack focused on enhancing the pure Minecraft experience.

Improve your FPS, fix errors, increase rendering distance, enhance visuals, and many quality-of-life improvements!

There are som mods that might be considered cheating or not vanilla freindly at all, here is the list in case you want to dissable/remove them from the pack:
- Xaeros Minimap and Worldmap
- Bridging Mod (bedrock bridging)
- Freecam (move freely outside your body, like spectator but unable to pass through blocks)
- Vanilla refresh
- Right Click Harvest

If you have any suggestions or feedback pls contact me on discord: Prisy#8042
